sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48188" key="qeoke/leustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-κέλευστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n48188.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ordered by God</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θέσκελα</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
